tfg.emi.bacon_requirement: Bacon - The Raw Pork must be smoked first
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.title: Spawn Location
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.desert: A land of heat and sand. Surviving here is all about finding the few plants that grow in such a hot and dry climate. If you can make it to LV, you will find the surface oil deposits and flat plains very useful.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.polar: It's extremely cold. The polar climate is desolate, but there are still some flora and fauna that like to live up there. Surviving on an ice sheet will be a challenge in managing heat and will require some creative farming.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.tundra: The tundra is cold, but not too cold. You will be able to find plenty of forests and animals, with some semblance of the seasons. Long-term survival will be a test of how well you prepare and stockpile for winter.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.temperat:
§lThis start is recommended for new players§r

Enjoy the beauty of the seasons. A temperate climate allows many different flora and fauna to live and thrive, as long as they can brace the winter months. This start has a little bit of everything that TerraFirmaCraft has to offer.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.tropical: A 24/7 paradise. Enjoy the lush rainforests and perfect year-round farming conditions. Spawning in the tropics will also make collecting Latex and Kaolin Clay much easier. Survival here should be straightforward, if a bit hot.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.beneath: A true test of your skills. You will spawn and start in the hellish Beneath. While normal progression is possible down here, expect it to be very difficult and require some unorthodox methods to survive and progress.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.default:
§lThis start is recommended for new players§r

The classic you know and love. You can spawn anywhere from subtropical to subpolar, and everything in between. Let the game decide exactly where you spawn, within generally livable conditions.
tfg.gui.spawn_condition.tooltip.tfcgenvi:
You have selected your own spawn via the §aWorld Preview§r feature.

Turn its §6Spawn Overlay§r toggle off to get back the normal spawn selection options.
